rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §43.005 governs State Board of Education authority to contract with private investment managers for the permanent school fund. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to investment manager contracting.
quote: Sec. 43.005. EXTERNAL INVESTMENT MANAGERS. (a) The State Board of Education may contract with private professional investment managers to assist the board in making investments of the permanent school fund.
_note: Rule text concerns permanent school fund investment management; no textual or operational overlap with the proposed property tax homestead exemption increase.
